S.FORM: O Sankulidekeseng (Holam: ŚĪĪŤį∑Ť£ŹÁöĄś≠ĆŤĀ≤, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Yen-cu-min ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2019 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^
